Rematch is a good game. It is unique and it scratches a specific itch. That being said, the game has it's problems. Janky mechanics prone to abuse is one that bothers me the most. There are some bugs still, and sometimes there are very noticeable server lags. The community gives devs a lot of ♥♥♥♥ for all of this. And in my opinion they are being way to harsh, outright mean towards them. It's like they are forgetting that the game's wellbeing is in the studio's best interest. They are also forgetting that it is a small studio making the game.

About 98% of my playtime is with a premade group. Playing the game with friends is a vastly more enjoyable experience and that is how I would recommend the game be played.

While the devs do sometimes make some questionable decisions, that doesn't justify you being an ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ towards them. Feedback is important, stomping on the devs won't have a positive impact. The game has visible potential, and it would be a shame if it were not to reach it because of a ♥♥♥♥♥♥ playerbase.

Also I feel like the game is really unoptimized.

The team needs to reorganize its product backlog, as it’s clear they don’t fully understand their player base. For example, the current point system is poorly designed, especially when considering casual players. Depending on your win rate, you lose a disproportionate number of points compared to what you gain from winning matches. This can lead to situations where, even after winning more games overall, your final point total for the day is low or even negative. As a result, it becomes discouraging to play, since your progress is affected by a poorly implemented rule.

Overall, the drop in player numbers over the past few months shows that many of your decisions have been misguided. To give some perspective, your average player count is now lower than Tibia, an MMORPG released in 1997. My suggestion is to communicate more with your remaining community and actually play the game yourselves, because it’s clear that the team lacks understanding of how it currently feels to players.

It’s a very fun and addicting game to play with friends — matches get intense fast, and when everyone is communicating and working together it’s some of the most fun you’ll have online. The core gameplay is incredibly satisfying, and when a match flows well it feels amazing.

However, the ranked system really needs work. There’s no penalty for leaving a ranked match, so players can quit mid-game without consequences. This leads to way too many matches turning into 4v5 (or worse), completely ruining the competitive experience when someone rage-quits or disconnects.

Another big thing the game needs is more modes to drive player engagement. The gameplay is great, but the lack of variety makes the experience feel repetitive over time. Adding more modes or events would help keep the player base active and give everyone more reasons to log in.

Rematch – это глоток свежего воздуха в жанре 
Почему Rematch – это игра, которую стоит попробовать:

•  Инновационный геймплей: Забудьте все, что вы знали раньше! Rematch предлагает абсолютно новую игровую механику, которая заставит вас переосмыслить жанр. Это не просто развлечение, это – вызов вашему интеллекту и креативности.
•  Потрясающий визуальный стиль: Rematch – это настоящее произведение искусства. Каждый кадр, каждый персонаж, каждая деталь продумана до мелочей и выполнена в уникальном, запоминающемся стиле. Игра выглядит просто великолепно!

Но, как и у любой игры, у Rematch есть свои недостатки:

•  Кривая обучения: Инновационный геймплей может показаться сложным для освоения на первых порах. Однако, не стоит отчаиваться! После небольшого периода адаптации вы сможете в полной мере насладиться всеми возможностями игры.
•  Возможные технические проблемы: Как и любая новая игра, Rematch может содержать небольшие технические недочеты. Однако, разработчики активно работают над их устранением и постоянно выпускают обновления.

Вердикт:

Rematch – это игра, которая заслуживает вашего внимания. Несмотря на некоторые недостатки, она предлагает уникальный и захватывающий игровой опыт, который вы не найдете ни в одной другой игре. Если вы ищете что-то новое и интересное, Rematch – это ваш выбор! Не упустите возможность прикоснуться к будущему игровой индустрии!

Rematch is what some would like to call "Rocket League but with People". But incase that doesn't clue you in to what that entails, let me explain. Rematch is a teambased football Game, focused on a speed and precison. Where just like in the game that it gets jokeingly refered to, you can shoot, and pass the ball of giant barriers that cover out of bounds areas of the playing area, allowing you to essentially include the walls in your plays. 

The potential with this game is by all means very limitless. It's competitive, it's fun with friends, it has all the right ingredients to be great. But there is just one giant flaw, one catch, that makes it hard for me to even recommend the game, no matter how much i love it.

That flaw is the execution of its ongoing development is simply not good enough. While the devs clearly care and are trying their best, the updates are consistently breaking more than they fix. We are currently stuck in a painful loop of delays and regression that is slowly eroding player trust of a dwindling player base. The caution they are takeing before adding any new features is understandable but the game is lacking in places it never should have.

In its current state, Rematch is a brilliant tech demo wrapped in a fragile package. Keep an eye on its patch notes, but maybe keep your wallet closed until the dust settles, or this flower finally blooms.

La yarará es una de las serpientes venenosas más comunes de Argentina. Pertenece al género Bothrops y suele habitar en áreas húmedas, campos, pastizales, zonas ribereñas y entornos rurales. Su tamaño varía entre los 60 cm y 1,2 metros. Presenta un cuerpo robusto, cabeza triangular bien marcada y manchas laterales en forma de “Y” o “herradura”, que le dan su nombre. Es una especie generalmente tímida: no ataca sin motivo, pero se defiende cuando se la pisa, se la molesta o se siente acorralada. Su veneno es hemotóxico, es decir, afecta directamente la sangre, los vasos sanguíneos y los tejidos, pudiendo causar dolor intenso, inflamación, hematomas, ampollas y, en casos graves, daño sistémico.

En caso de mordedura de yarará, la prioridad es actuar de inmediato pero con calma. Lo primero es mantener al afectado lo más tranquilo posible, ya que la aceleración del ritmo cardíaco favorece la circulación del veneno. Es importante inmovilizar la zona afectada y evitar caminar o realizar esfuerzos innecesarios. La herida debe lavarse únicamente con agua y jabón, sin aplicar hielo, alcohol, cremas, ni ningún tipo de sustancia casera. No se deben realizar cortes, succionar el veneno, ni colocar torniquetes, ya que estas prácticas empeoran la lesión.

Una vez realizada la limpieza básica, la extremidad debe mantenerse a la altura del corazón, sin elevarse demasiado ni dejarla colgando. La persona debe ser trasladada rápidamente al centro de salud más cercano para recibir evaluación médica y, de ser necesario, el suero antiofídico específico para yarará. Es fundamental no perder tiempo intentando capturar al animal; basta con recordar sus características generales para informar al personal de salud.

Las mordeduras de yarará pueden ser graves, pero cuando el tratamiento se aplica a tiempo, el pronóstico suele ser favorable. La prevención también es clave: usar calzado cerrado y alto en zonas de pastizales, evitar meter las manos en huecos o pilas de leña sin ver, y caminar atento en áreas donde estas serpientes suelen encontrarse.

This game needs a Skill Tree. Taking away individuality killed the game. I've been playing since it came out and played the betas before it; having the rainbow flick as your only "cool" dribble move is absurd. Team play was already encouraged by common sense; forcing team play upon the players by making the individual worse is the problem.

Make a collaboration with Blue Lock, for god's sake. I understand wanting the game to be like football, but most people want the exciting part of football, not this. The teamwork will come by itself; most people know the optimal play is to pass, but having the choice not to is fun. But now, if you try any sort of individual play, you are trolling because there's no hope of ever pulling off a 1v2 (or even a clean 1v1), unless the enemy misplays horribly. Give us more options for dribbling; lean into the more fantastical side of football.

Give us play-styles to choose from so we can lean into what we like to do, more shooting-oriented stats or running-specific perks, and I'm sure goalkeeper-only players would love that. Make ranked feel more professional by letting people choose their preferred position before they queue up, rotating after every goal feels weird. This isn't Volleyball. 
I'm the kind of player to focus on defense and rarely try to score, but when I do, I try fancy plays, and I love pulling them off. But it feels like the game(currently) is against that, having fun; everything feels much slower and repetitive.

It needs structure; you should not force teamwork in a game like this. This isn't football, and it shouldn't try to be football. Teamwork will always be a factor by default, and that's great, but it shouldn't be the only thing the game has to offer. That's not how football highlights are created, and I want whoever is reading this to think about it. What is more memorable? A team play or an individual play? Individual is less optimal; hence seeing it being pulled off is impressive. Allow us to do that; give us the tools.

In conclusion, I love making team plays with my friends and fellow players, but being restricted by this current meta is infuriating. I think good teamwork should continue to be what makes the difference between high and low rank, but I don't see any downsides to letting the individual player feel more influential. It's a 5v5, not 11v11. I truly love this game, and I would love if it embraced what it can become and not what it currently is: boring football with fewer players.

Franchement, Rematch avait un vrai potentiel, mais aujourd’hui il manque cruellement de contenu. Le studio passe son temps à ajouter des modes de jeu temporaires… tout en retirant des modes déjà existants, ce qui donne l’impression de tourner en rond plutôt que d’enrichir réellement l’expérience.

En plus, le jeu est truffé de bugs : crashs, problèmes de serveurs, mécaniques qui ne fonctionnent pas correctement… On passe parfois plus de temps à subir les problèmes techniques qu’à s’amuser.

Et pour ne rien arranger, on voit clairement que la priorité est mise sur la boutique payante in-game plutôt que sur les correctifs. Les mises à jour semblent plus orientées vers les achats que vers l’amélioration du jeu lui-même, ce qui devient franchement frustrant.

J’espère vraiment que les dirigeants du studio vont se ressaisir et remettre le développement du jeu au centre de leurs priorités, parce qu’à ce rythme-là, Rematch risque de perdre définitivement sa communauté.

Rematch tinha tudo para ser um jogo realmente grande, mas a impressão é de que a empresa simplesmente desistiu dele. Não há qualquer sinal de vontade de melhorar, atualizar ou reviver a experiência. O foco continua sendo cosméticos sem graça, feios e totalmente desconectados do esporte como se isso fosse o suficiente para segurar uma comunidade inteira. Pelo visto, perder cerca de 90% da player base não foi o bastante para a desenvolvedora perceber o tamanho do problema.

Hoje o jogo parece largado. O público, que já chegou perto dos 100 mil jogadores, mal passa de 10 mil. As partidas viraram um show de extremos: ou você enfrenta um grupo de nerds abusando de mecânicas quebradas, como o voleio, ou cai contra times fracos que seguram um 1x0 por quatro minutos só para estragar a experiência. Todo mundo quer ser o protagonista, e isso transforma algo que podia ser divertido em algo frustrante.

É triste porque o jogo é bom, tem potencial, tem ideias legais só falta cuidado, direção e respeito pela comunidade. Rematch poderia ser muito mais do que é hoje. Infelizmente, parece que a chance passou e ninguém do outro lado está disposto a fazer algo a respeito.

Meanwhile on my team, most players don't know how to receive the ball, sit in front of the opposing goal and spam rainbow flicks to result in nothing. This has been EVERY SINGLE GAME for the last two weeks, and has only been a problem since the end of the first season. They did something that ruined the elo system entirely, and aren't punishing players who are abusing it.

LEAVING the game should make any non-premade teammates keep their elo. Insta-losing 20RP in a 3v5 or 4v5 is disgusting.

For anyone looking to pick this up, don't pay a penny for it. Wait for them to make it free-to-play so you can have a go and experience the same mental trauma I did. Unplayable in its current state unless you have a premade 3 or 5.

Rematch started as one of those games that I could have seen myself play over the span of maybe even years. After the early access I craved the full release like a crack addict looking for his next dose. 

Due to the lack of content I am now bored by the game. I accomplished to reach diamond in season 0 and season 1, so my desire to play ranked is saturated. The new fireball gamemode is just completely useless since they never fixed the issue with people leaving matches, also  the gamemode seems to need a high level of teamplay and precicion and no one is willing to follow that pattern. Hence a lot of flaming, loosing and toxicity.

BUT the biggest flaw of the game is, that there is NO working report or penalty system in place. People constantly leave and abondon matches, even if they just started. When the enemy team scores even once, both in quickplay and ranked players just leave. There is not even a small time penalty for abandoning a match....

The playerbase is also super toxic when you miss a shot even once or lose the ball. You WILL get the "good job" spam and would get insulted in voicechat if not turned off since day one. 

At this rate I can only give one advice: DO NOT PLAY THIS GAME

Rematch é o famoso rei 👑 que não soube governar. Ele tinha tudo para ser incrível! Um jogo revolucionário de futebol, que mistura animações épicas, trabalho em time e diversão… mas que se sabotou por conta própria.

Infelizmente, não posso dar uma review positiva em um jogo que parece ter sido abandonado e mal planejado pelos devs, ou que deveria ser um Early Access. Porque é isso que ele aparenta ser.

Rematch desde seu lançamento enfrentou diversos problemas (e basicamente todos envolviam seus desenvolvedores). A Temporada 0, que seria a mais importante, demorou quase 6 meses sem quase nenhum tipo de atualização, e quando a tão prometida Temporada 1 lançou… bom, não teve nada demais 😐. Lançaram um crossplay que veio tarde e os bugs ainda continuavam. Melhoravam coisa aqui e ali, mas o jogo até o momento não fornece NADA que te prenda. Você termina o passe de temporada e pronto, acabou tudo o que tinha para fazer.

Não tem eventos, não tem modos de jogo diferentes, melhores customizações… nada. O jogo leva 4 meses para ter uma nova atualização que traz 3 camisas e um passe meia-bomba. Parece que falta criatividade ou vontade por parte da Sloclap em fazer esse jogo funcionar. Para ter noção, existem itens do jogo que nem nome têm — é literalmente "BALL_MS01_BLUE" 🤦‍♂️. Cara, é vergonhoso.

Em resumo: Rematch é um jogo que está nadando de braçada, sozinho em um grande oceano de dinheiro… mas ele não sabe nadar.

Se você quer comprar o jogo, pegue em uma boa promoção ou espere ele terminar de falir, ou a Sloclap finalmente trabalhar para entregar atualizações e roadmaps bons de verdade.

📌 E se isso te ajudou a não torrar 80 reais, por favor manda uma medalhinha no meu perfil ou na review! 🏅

REMATCH is the love of your life in high school. You wait for it, dream about it, crave it, and when it finally arrives, you’re overwhelmed with excitement.

When I saw the first playtest, I was the happiest man alive. At last, a sports game built entirely on skill: no Pay-to-Win, no packs, no corporate greed from EA lurking behind it. 
Just a small studio, the same publisher as Expedition 33, and a project that inspired trust. 

Then the game launched.

Since release, REMATCH has felt like that first love: it could have been perfect, if only it lasted. You’ll always think back and wonder, “What if…?” What if the developers had taken a different path? 
Day one was fun, but unpolished: bugs, disconnections, crashes everywhere. They tried to patch things slowly, too slowly, and with every fix new problems appeared. 
Like with your first love, you keep fighting, telling yourself it will be fine, because “Hey, this is the love of your life, don’t waste it.”

But then came the decision to bundle new features with fixes. Patches dragged on, cross-play was forced in, and players began to leave. I poured 600 hours into Season 0, plus 150 more during the betas. I still believe REMATCH could become the next great eSport, but the road is steep.

Community-wise, it’s tough for newcomers. Most of the remaining players are either competitive teams or ego-driven veterans, which makes learning the game harder. To play well, you need vision and tactical awareness, qualities rare in a world conditioned by FIFA and arcade-style sports titles. Here, movement is deeply simulative: you must sync perfectly with teammates, press together, fill the right spaces at the right time. 
The "meta" itself demands technical mastery: knowing where to place the ball to trigger the right animation, where to pass to unlock your teammate’s movement. 

This complexity could be the foundation of a true eSport, but it also risks keeping the player base small.

As a fan, the biggest issue is how static matches feel. Competitive players reset to the keeper, call the scheme, execute it. Rarely do you see someone shine with a clever dribble or an unexpected move. Watching tournaments, you often find yourself bored, skipping ahead to the next game.

Still, I believe the Game Awards nomination might shine a spotlight on REMATCH, helping rebuild its community. And I hope it wins “Best Sports Game.” Why? Because it deserves it. It’s fresh, original, and skill-based, everything a sport should be. FC is a money machine, Mario Kart isn’t even a sport. REMATCH is the only title on the list that truly fits.

My hope is that winning will attract a bigger company, maybe Epic Games, to buy the IP and elevate it; just as they did with Rocket League. Because despite all its flaws, REMATCH is still great. And maybe, like the love of your life, you grow apart, live your own story, and then one day stumble back into her arms. You try again from where you left off, and maybe this time you live your best life with what you always knew was the love of your life. You’ll never know unless you try.

История этой игры началась также быстро как и закончилась. При всей рекламе, огромном охвате пользователей и любви игроков на этапе бета-версии релиз вышел ужасно провальным. Большие проблемы со стабильностью серверов, которые долгое время не решались, сильно отразились на онлайне и отношении людей к игре. Со временем стали заметны проблемы с качеством подбора рейтинговых игр (опять же из-за просевшего онлайна). В игре мало разнообразия, все механики, построенные на скилле, нерфят, зачастую забитый гол зависит от удачи или своевременного "пролага" сервера. Как бы комично это не звучало, но самый стабильный аспект этого продукта - это внутриигровой магазин (и то, который временами отключается), куча бесполезных коллабораций и скинов, которые не призывают в игру новых людей. Что мы имеем в итоге? Редкие обновления, не добавляющие новых механик и стабильно понижающийся онлайн (играть остались одни задроты), система репортов только на сервер (руинеры продолжают портить игры), первый сезон оказывается был нулевым и предназначался для дальнейшей беты (спасибо за огромный ценник для потребления незаконченного продукта). El juego en si apuntaba maneras, cumple con partidas rápidas, pero la evolución del juego por parte de los desarrolladores no ha sido la mejor, además de lenta. Habían bug del juego que han tardado mucho en corregir, y aparecen nuevos. El crossplay tardo tiempo en entrar. Jugar con amigos es divertido, podéis hacer vuestras jugadas etc, jugar solo, normalmente no tanto. Dado el soporte que le han dado al juego no creo que valga el precio que tiene, pero sin duda creo que es un juego que puede darte momentos divertidos.

This game feels really good to play. There is some occasional jank with playing Keeper, but I can understand the reasoning behind most other interactions. The sound design and animations make it really fun to kick the ball. It's even better when you can seamlessly pass between a bunch of people my just smashing the ball into their face, and they can do a weird flip kick to pass it on. 

This is a really fun game if you have people to play with. If you do not, it gets a little more questionable because most people are inexplicably high ranked from playing with their friends. You will get so many teams that don't even try to score cause they cannot comprehend passing the ball and/or they just dribble it into the corner and take a shot from the worst position possible.

Honestly after witnessing the negative reviews I felt like I should drop one just to target the ones that really wants to buy the game.

It's a very good and fun game with or without friends since every game takes about 4 to 7 minutes you can enjoy playing with or against many people who know the game very well or people who just started playing it.
 
There is crossplay so if teammate or rivals are on ps5 or x-box they or you can do some skills that they can't replicate such as some animation-cancel dribbles but that's ok, no need to take the entire concept too seriously since after those abuses appear developers fix it.

Some people are concerned about longer wait time on ranked and other modes, they are concerned about little kids appearing on their teams, people who do not pass or be the goalkeeper but they are all avoidable, if you are playing with 4 duos of yours OBVIOUSLY game will also try to find another 5 group friends AT YOUR RANK AND ON YOUR SERVER to make the match you can simply change the server to auto and enable crossplay to make that time down to few minutes. Or simply play quickplay which longer I have waited was 5 minutes shorty after updates or late nights. Sometimes children (younger than 14) appear on your matches and they do not care much about teamplay they never play the goalkeeper or pass or communicate in any way but that also mean the other team also has some of them when you win, I figured these kids mostly play on ps5 or x-box so I simply disable crossplay on global holidays or school hours if I play those times. 

There are too many modes or I feel like it, the game should shrink the available modes or make the week /2 week long modes a day or two day long periodically and force people to play either quickplay or ranked on normal times I barely wait 1 or 2 minutes for a quickplay but every few matches I see the same individuals that I see in the last 6 months on my team or the other team.

If someone leaves during match and our team have a chance of winning (such as currently draw and minute 2) game most likely (90 percent in my opinion) will find a player for your team, however if your team is losing 0-3 and game is about to end in a minute that spot would never fill. Which is sensible in my opinion.

Season passes are friendly if you play decent amount of games it's not hard to ace the entire free cosmetics and titles and the free cosmetics are no different than the ones in the paid pass, just less. Comparing with other games with the same concept this game stays above almost all of them.

Barely any hackers, I have like 2500 games I think and I've seen one hacker only which only had shoot power/speed hack. Others I've seen on media platforms but never in the game. Although there are many skill/animation abusers  but if you play more than 50 hours you learn how to stop even the dribble abusers.

To the millennial folks who are considering to buy this game, honestly best thing about this game for me is every match is only 4 to 7 minutes which you can just say "one last game before the bed" and you don't have to suffer 40-60 minutes like you have to do in other competitive shooting / Moba games, after work, simply play few games and relax.

If you've seen the comments that say "game is dead don't buy it make it free" basically ignore them the game has a lot of players and lesser wait time between queues than they say, if you want to play on a specific server, on a specific set of ranks with a specific set of group and must specific platform the waiting time eventually will be longer than average. You can disable / enable these entire things to drop it down to few minutes, even seconds.

Rematch foi o único jogo de futebol em muitos anos que realmente me fez criar paixão pelo gênero novamente. Eu passava horas jogando, assistindo vídeos, acompanhando streams e discutindo estratégias com a comunidade. O núcleo da jogabilidade é fantástico e continua sendo um dos conceitos mais divertidos que já vi em um jogo de futebol.

Justamente por isso é tão triste ver o estado atual do jogo.

A cada atualização, parece que os desenvolvedores se afastam do que realmente importa. Enquanto problemas de estabilidade, otimização e qualidade de vida continuam sem solução, recebemos cada vez mais cosméticos que pouco agregam à experiência.

O pior é que muitas correções acabam criando novos problemas. Um bug é resolvido, mas outros dois aparecem. A sensação é de que o jogo está constantemente dando um passo para frente e dois para trás.

O resultado dessa gestão fica evidente nos números. Um jogo que chegou a reunir dezenas de milhares de jogadores simultâneos hoje luta para manter uma comunidade ativa. Os lobbies estão cada vez mais vazios e a confiança da comunidade parece diminuir a cada atualização.

⚠️ Atualização da Review

Continuei jogando depois de escrever esta análise. Com muito menos frequência, é verdade. Sozinho, praticamente nunca. Apenas com amigos, porque no fim das contas a verdadeira essência de um jogo é se divertir.

Mas se a sua ideia é subir elo, competir seriamente ou aproveitar tudo aquilo que o jogo prometeu entregar, esqueça. Nada mudou.

A promessa de torneios, eventos competitivos e um ecossistema mais robusto parece cada vez mais distante. Enquanto isso, a prioridade continua sendo empurrar cosméticos que, na maioria das vezes, são sem graça, pouco inspirados e completamente desconectados do que a comunidade realmente pede.

E as colaborações? Sinceramente, uma oportunidade desperdiçada.

Rematch tem espaço de sobra para fazer coisas criativas e memoráveis. Um jogo com essa pegada arcade combina muito mais com personagens icônicos, animações malucas, comemorações marcantes, efeitos de chute, rastros personalizados e conteúdos realmente divertidos. Em vez disso, recebemos itens escassos, repetitivos e que enjoam rapidamente.

O mais frustrante é que o potencial continua ali. Dá para enxergar claramente o jogo incrível que Rematch poderia ser. Por isso ainda continuo jogando de vez em quando. Não porque esteja satisfeito com a direção atual, mas porque a base da jogabilidade continua sendo muito boa.

E talvez essa seja a maior tragédia do jogo: ele é divertido o suficiente para me fazer voltar, mas decepcionante demais para que eu consiga recomendá-lo.

Então minha opinião continua a mesma:

Tenho vergonha de indicar que alguém gaste R$ 80 neste jogo no estado atual.

Se os desenvolvedores voltarem a priorizar a jogabilidade, a estabilidade, a otimização e o conteúdo que a comunidade realmente deseja, terei prazer em mudar esta análise.

Até lá, Rematch continua sendo um jogo cheio de potencial, preso em decisões ruins.

E, sinceramente...

reviews.review:
All'inizio il gioco mi incuriosiva parecchio ma non convinceva del tutto, devo dire di essermi positivamente tolto ogni dubbio una volta provato.

Il gameplay è frenetico, divertente e spinge il giocatore a fare la classica "ultima partita" che irrimediabilmente non è mai effettivamente l'ultima, specialmente se in compagnia di amici con cui fare squadra. Il sistema di gioco in generale è solido ed adatto a tutti, a patto di perdere un po' di tempo all'inizio per imparare bene come gestire la palla, la fase di non possesso etc, ma ne vale davvero la pena: una volta apprese le basi infatti sarà facile rendersi utili con un assist o magari una parata decisiva, dando anche ai novizi la possibilità di divertirsi già dalle primissime partite. Inoltre, il fatto che la partita non venga praticamente mai interrotta (se non dopo un goal) rende il tutto molto adrenalinico.

Ovviamente non stiamo parlando di un titolo perfetto, segnalo ad esempio gli input che a volte non rispondono perfettamente o contrasti che a volte vanno un po' fuori logica. Tutti difetti che col tempo si imparano a conoscere ed accettare ma che se rimossi renderebbero l'esperienza ancora più entusiasmante

Consigliatissimo a tutti!

Рематч — это игра, которая ощущается так, будто FIFA и Rust пошли в баню, подрались, упали в костёр и из пепла вылупилось вот это. Футбол вроде есть, но местами кажется, что ты лутаешь не мяч, а бочку на берегу.

Моя команда из рандомов — это отдельная вселенная боли.
На воротах стоит Тревожный Выживальщик, который, похоже, всю жизнь играл только в Rust. Он не ловит мячи — он от них прячется. Каждый удар по воротам вызывает у него флешбеки: «Меня рейдят! Меня рейдят!» Поэтому он бегает вдоль ворот, как будто ищет, куда спрятать лут.

В защите играет FIFA-Задрот 89 уровня, который в реальной жизни нажимал только две кнопки: пас и подкат. В итоге в Рематче он ведёт себя так же — пытается провернуть фирменный подкат из FIFA, но физика тут не такая, и выглядит это так, будто в Rust чувак споткнулся о камень и поймал медведя лицом.

А нападающий… Это отдельная трагикомедия.
Игрок, который думает, что он в FIFA на легендарном уровне, стоит перед воротами врага и ждёт идеальный пас, как будто собирается пробить зеленый тайм-финиш. Но это Рематч, тут тайминг такой же предсказуемый, как рейд в Rust в 4 утра. Каждый мяч он теряет с такой скоростью, будто его только что убили с болтовки с 300 метров.

После любой своей ошибки он спамит чат фразами уровня:
«Ну вы просто пас дать не можете»,
«Не по мета-страте играете»,
«В FIFA бы я уже 5:0 делал».
Хотя в FIFA он, судя по всему, играет исключительно на новичке.

В итоге Рематч — это такая смесь Rust и FIFA, где:
— как в Rust, ты постоянно страдаешь, но возвращаешься,
— как в FIFA, ты бесишься на тиммейтов, но делаешь вид, что всё ок,
— как в обеих играх, ты клянёшься удалить это всё к чёртовой матери…
и запускаешь через пять минут.
Некоторые матчи в этой игре ощущаются как в команде с пьяным батей, а его кенты в противоположной команде

令人血脉喷张的单骑闯关，令队友尖叫的倒钩进球，令门将恼怒的墙反爆射，一切的一切，RM在正式发售前的每一次测试都令我感到纯粹的开心，那种在高考前偷偷感受一下踢球乐趣的快乐。
正式发售如期到来，我第一时间入手，依旧是熟悉的感觉，富有张力的画面，充满激情的动作模组，传切的美学......后来，我如愿加入了国内最强战队TTK，各种新技巧被发掘出来，这是极好的。可是当玩家们发现最稳定最有效的胜利方式是占点静待传球再抢点后，RM的纯粹快乐戛然而止，制作组始终无法平衡各类战术的强度，当我看见比赛在静止中度过一分一秒后，我意识到了我很久没打开RM也不想再打开RM的原因。有人说为了比赛胜利，高水平的对局自然会趋向大部分时间的无聊，我并不这么觉得。相比于2015年横空出世的RL，RM无疑拥有更有表现力的画面，更易上手的操作以及进球后更加即时的爽感，或许是制作组的无能，或许是底层机制的差距，RM能吸引我的时长上限也就在一百小时了，相比于游戏时长上千小时的RL来说，RM无疑亟需改变，在比赛中感受不同的进攻美学，重拾纯粹的足球乐趣。
祝好。

С друзьями играть весело, но в одного уже не очень, есть конечно и хорошие игроки, но и токсиков, которые при этом играть не умеют тоже хватает, раньше были ещё люди, которые специально руинили игры, но вроде сейчас таких не заметно, вероятно из-за уменьшения онлайна такие ушли тоже. Собственно сейчас это главная проблема, онлайн падает и уже сильно низкий, играть 3-4-5 игр подряд с одними соперниками ничего не обычного, а не в вечернее время тем более, вроде уже и большую часть багов пофиксили и в геймплее поприятнее некоторые вещи сделали, даже пинг стал получше чем был, правда с обновлениями этими опоздали, много людей ушло из-за прошлых проблем, кому-то уже приелось всё одно и тоже. Но и не все проблемы ушли, есть всё ещё неприятные абузные механики, физика взаимодействия с мячом всё ещё с проблемами, хоть и не такими как в конце нулевого сезона, когда ты касался мяча, а реакции было ноль, как будто ничего и не сделал, из багов разве что возникает тот, когда ты не можешь вести мяч, только взаимодействовать кнопками, сезон подходит к концу, так и не пофиксили, на старте сезона часто не подсоединяло к серверам после нахождения матча, сейчас реже, но такое ещё наблюдается. Не знаю что может спасти Рематч, перевод на F2P модель или какие-то прям масштабные обновления, но пока игра умирает, жаль, потенциал был хороший, играть всё ещё нравится, но хотелось бы, чтоб она стала более живой.

⭐🚫 Rematch tiene un concepto genial, pero su estado actual no está a la altura de un juego competitivo ni de pago.
Los problemas de sincronización son constantes: barridas que el juego no detecta, colisiones que fallan sin sentido y situaciones donde la pelota simplemente decide no interactuar con el jugador. Todo esto rompe por completo el ritmo de un partido y vuelve la experiencia muy inconsistente.

Además, se presentan fallos graves que afectan directamente la jugabilidad. En más de una ocasión la pelota atravesó a jugadores o rebotó de formas que no coinciden con la animación. Incluso me pasó que, después de reconectarme, la pelota dejó de tener colisión con mi personaje y solo podía pegarle o tirar para que reaccionara… algo totalmente inaceptable para un juego centrado en precisión y timing.

🔌 Caídas de conexión y crasheos
El juego se ha cerrado solo varias veces o me ha desconectado sin motivo en medio del partido. No ocurre siempre, pero cuando pasa, arruina por completo la experiencia. También se dan microcortes y picos de lag justo después de goles o jugadas importantes, lo cual genera más frustración que diversión.

💬 Conclusión
El potencial de Rematch es enorme, y cuando funciona, se puede ver lo que podría llegar a ser. Pero hoy por hoy, la parte técnica está muy por debajo de lo esperado. No es fácil disfrutarlo de manera consistente, y menos en un entorno donde cada jugada depende de precisión.

Ojalá las próximas actualizaciones realmente ataquen estos problemas de raíz, porque el concepto lo vale… pero el estado actual no acompaña....

24 novembre 900 giocatori online. Sono contento che il declino di questo gioco sia arrivato così presto. Il gioco in sè è bello e potenzialmente super divertente se non fosse per la community tossica di ego-boostati che hanno creduto di poter essere i numeri uno dei numeri uno nell'immaginario degli e-sports. Spoiler non diventarà mai un e-sports essendo le partite fatte di un solo tipo di gameplay che anche patch dopo patch non cambia per davvero il meta del gioco semplicemente lo depotenzia, o almeno cosi credono gli sviluppatori. Il problema è che la rovesciata continua a essere l'unico modo che da una sicurezza di poter workare, dando ai player uno/due modi per essere efficienti sotto porta, i bug fix dei develop sono finti, e si continua a non dare spazio alla spettacolarità per favorire un gameplay piatto ed era difficile riuscirci onestamente.
 il ruolo del portiere: purtroppo ingiustamente nerfato, talmente nerfato che a volte finta le animazioni pur di non prendere la palla. 
Il ruolo del difensore: ottimo e fondamentale, una figura purtroppo mitologica in "solo" costringendoti a gameplay frustranti, vedo elite non conoscere il positioning sugli attacanti.
 il ruolo degli attacanti: selfish come poche cose al mondo non conoscono il tasto per passare che andrebbe anche bene se sapessero segnare.
 L'unico modo per divertirsi è giocare con gli amici, il problema è che non abbiamo amici e quei pochi che abbiamo sono super tossici, flammatori seriali, tilter professionisti, ergo le possibilità di divertirsi rasentano lo 0. Lo consiglierei ? assolutamente no. Da un ex Elite in pensione peak elo 500 lp in solo con i random per almost 700 ore. 

P.S. 25 euro fatevi un a y c e dal giappo di fiducia.

Edit: ora ne ho 950 di ore e confermo tutto <3

I’m not really satisfied with Rematch. While the concept of competitive online matches is appealing, the actual gameplay experience falls short. Matchmaking often takes far too long, which breaks the pacing and makes it difficult to stay engaged. The controls feel unnecessarily complex for what the game tries to offer, and instead of feeling intuitive, they make even simple actions frustrating.  

On top of that, the price feels overly high considering the overall experience. For a game that still struggles with basic flow and accessibility, the value just isn't there. Unfortunately, I can’t recommend it in its current state.

Probably the best football game in a long time. Unfortunately I fear the devs have crippled the games chances of being a major success. It was released full of bugs and they don't seem to have a clear vision on what they want the gameplay to be.

Nonetheless, I hope it has a long tail and finds a way to bring in new players as it is great fun.

I enjoyed this game for a very long time and there have been a ton of fixes when compared to the beta's of the game. The hit registration is much better for goal keeping, but the marker for when you get to pass/shoot the ball is still very unbalanced.
Yet, my negative review doesn't come from that, it comes from the unfair matchmaking you get in ranked.
Getting matched into 4 men stacks every single game in competitive gets boring, since they have privileged communication and coordination when compared to 5 randoms. This is what is ruining the game in my experience.

For this reason, if you're casual/playing with friends, please enjoy the game.
If you're a competitive solo player, stay clear, teamwork is very important in this game and you'll always be in an unfair starting position.

D’un jeu attendu, REMATCH est devenu un jeu détestable. Première évaluation que je laisse depuis que j’ai mon compte Steam, et c’est pour dire à quel point c’est affligeant.

D’une hype incroyable au début, avec une communauté qui se voyait grandir et évoluer, on passe maintenant à un gameplay complètement pété : ballon qui passe sous la map, tacles dans les pieds qui deviennent des tacles fantômes, priorités sur le ballon incompréhensibles (les hitboxes, on en parle ?), serveurs mous et instables (forcément, avec une perte de 90 000 joueurs, pourquoi payer pour des serveurs corrects), rollback du futur tellement c’est laggy… vous vous retrouvez 15 mois en arrière.

Privilégier le contenu esthétique plutôt que la qualité, c’est le choix fait ici. Les bugs remontés par la communauté ne sont jamais corrigés. Et forcément, comme plus personne ne veut payer 30€ pour le jeu (sans compter le Battle Pass et les DLC), autant partir sur les sponsors, ça paye au moins les développeurs… totalement absents.

En ranked, les joueurs sont juste cancer. Plutôt que de jouer le beau jeu, dès qu’il y a un but d’écart, c’est le festival de la puterie. Le matchmaking ? Un bordel sans nom. À partir d’un certain niveau proche de l’Elite, vous tombez 3-4 fois sur les mêmes équipes, tellement il n’y a personne sur le jeu.

Le jeu a été détruit par le manque d’activité de ses développeurs. Et les “patchs” qui passent sans patch notes ? Ah oui, sûrement pour ajouter des cosmétiques… my bad.

I participated in both open betas - In May and June 2025. It was the most anticipated and hyped game. I couldn't wait for it to drop. I even bought the Edition that allowed me to play a week earlier.

July - Lots of bugs, UI issues, match making in ranked was broken. I could be playing with Bronze 3 players while being ELITE 1.
1 dribbling animation, lots of trash cosmetics you can buy. The same soundtrack.

August - Pretty much the same issues from July, encountered a few cheaters - The game did not have a "in-game report system" at this point, so you had to manually write a ticket on their discord. 
SPOILER: The cheater is still active and plays the game lol.

Their Anti-cheat system is a joke. It's not even running in the Process tasks.

September - November: Same issues, they added 3v3 Ranked, In-game reporting now.
They made controlls so wanky and hard to use.
Using controller or keyboard+mouse is just not the same anymore. 
The goalkeeping animations are very slow and at most times broken.

If a player has more ping than you & lower refresh rate, then the player will win the ball 100%.

The Game had huge potential, but the lack of development of new features & bug fixes caused a major playerbase drop. 

- You can't "rematch the team you played"
- You can't create a team.
- You can only play 3v3 4v4 or 5v5.
- Dribbling is basically sliding your character across XY, very broken
- You can play against BRONZE 3 players while being ELITE 1, no skill cap.
- You get the same points (ELO) if you do nothing in the match or if you get MVP with 20k points.

5/10.
